name: azure-devops-integration
description: A VS Code extension for Azure DevOps. Browse pull requests in a sidebar grouped by Created by me, Assigned to me, and My teams, with review, check, and comment status. Auto-detects config from git remotes and extracts work item IDs from branch names. Create PRs, open repos, and link work items.

commands.title: Azure DevOps: Set Personal Access Token
Azure DevOps: Remove Personal Access Token

azureDevops.organization.description: Azure DevOps organization name. Auto-detected from git remote if not set.

azureDevops.project.description: Azure DevOps project name. Auto-detected from git remote if not set.

azureDevops.repository.description: Azure DevOps repository name. Auto-detected from git remote if not set.

azureDevops.workItemProject.description: Azure DevOps project for work items, if different from the repository's project. Falls back to azureDevops.project or the git remote's project.

azureDevops.branchPrefix.description: Personal branch prefix to strip when parsing branch names (e.g., 'lucac/').

azureDevops.workItemPattern.description: Custom regex pattern to extract work item ID from branch name. Must contain a capture group for the ID. Leave empty to use default patterns.

azureDevops.pullRequestRefreshInterval.description: Interval in seconds to auto-refresh the pull request list (minimum 30).
